evals.prompt: Design a backup strategy for our PostgreSQL database. We can tolerate a maximum of 1 hour of data loss (RPO) and need to be back online within 4 hours (RTO).
evals.expected_output: Backup and disaster recovery strategy meeting RPO and RTO targets.
expectations: Mandates continuous WAL archiving / Point-In-Time Recovery (PITR) to meet the 1-hour RPO
Suggests automated restore testing to guarantee the 4-hour RTO
Recommends offsite/cross-region storage for the backups

evals.prompt: What should our backup retention policy be for a healthcare application subject to HIPAA?
evals.expected_output: Data retention policy compliant with strict regulatory requirements.
expectations: Specifies short-term retention for operational recovery (e.g., 30 days)
Specifies long-term retention for compliance (e.g., 6-7 years for HIPAA)
Mentions encryption at rest for all backups
Mentions access controls and immutability (WORM storage)
